overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk through a Spanish Colonial style hotel complex. The camera moves from an open palm-lined driveway, through a covered arched colonnade, under a porte-cochère with NPC pedestrians, and into an interior lobby with red tile floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved hotel driveway with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along curved driveway approaching the Spanish Colonial building complex

entered.detail: large stucco building with arched windows and red tile roof
tall palm trees lining the street
ornamental black street lamp with multiple lights
well-maintained grass area between sidewalk and building
distant hillside sign visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a curved driveway lined with palm trees, approaching a large Spanish Colonial style building. The Vinewood sign is visible in the distance, and ornamental street lamps line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with arches alongside main building

events.description: enters covered colonnade from open driveway, ascending stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs and entering covered arched walkway alongside the building

entered.detail: series of stucco arches forming covered pedestrian walkway
red clay tile roof covering the colonnade
planted flowers along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered colonnade with arches on the left and building wall on the right. The space is sheltered with mixed lighting, and flower beds line the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: arched colonnade with views through arches to street

agents.ego_description: walking through colonnade with arches on left providing framed views to the street and palm trees outside

entered.detail: views of palm trees and street visible through arch openings

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the covered colonnade, with arches on the left framing views of the palm trees and street outside. The walkway is paved with tiles and the building wall remains on the right.

events.description: NPC pedestrians appear walking under the covered entrance area

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered porte-cochère entranceway, passing other pedestrians approaching the building

notable_agents.action: man in green shirt and shorts walking toward camera
man in dark jacket talking on phone walking past

entered.detail: large covered driveway entrance with recessed ceiling lights
main entrance doors with gold metal frames

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the colonnade into the covered porte-cochère entrance area. Several pedestrians are walking through the space, and the main glass entrance doors are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel lobby interior with red tile flooring

events.description: enters building interior through glass doors, transitioning from outdoor to indoor

agents.ego_description: walking into the lobby and looking around the interior space with arched windows

entered.detail: spacious lobby with red tile floors and stucco walls
large square support columns in lobby
arched windows on interior wall with blue tint

segments.scene_description: Entering the building interior through glass doors into a spacious lobby with red tile floors. The space features arched windows, support columns, and artificial lighting, marking a clear transition from the outdoor environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sunny, palm-lined exterior into the sheltered interior of a Spanish Colonial hotel. It begins by walking along a curved driveway past ornamental street lamps with the Vinewood sign visible in the distance, before transitioning into a covered colonnade. As the camera moves through this arched walkway, the open sunlight is replaced by mixed lighting and flower beds lining the wall, with the arches framing glimpses of the palms outside. The scene then opens into a bustling porte-cochère entrance where pedestrians mill about before the camera passes through glass doors. Finally, the environment shifts completely into a spacious interior lobby characterized by red tile floors, support columns, and artificial lighting.
